overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai walking through a traditional Japanese village at dusk, crossing a wooden bridge to overlook a stormy bay with distant mountains and smoke from fires visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village street between traditional wooden houses

events.description: villager walks across the path from right to left in front of the character
character turns left toward the stone wall and bridge approach

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow village street carrying a sword on their back

notable_agents.action: villager in dark robes walking across the path from right to left

entered.detail: traditional wooden building with dark timber walls and lattice windows
open wooden structure with visible firelight inside
large stone wall supporting a building above the path
traditional Japanese farmhouse with tiled roof visible ahead
tall wooden pole with horizontal crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow village street enclosed by traditional wooden buildings. A villager crosses the path ahead, and the character continues toward a stone retaining wall before turning left toward a bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge overlooking coastal inlet with mountain views

events.description: character steps from gravel path onto wooden bridge deck
character stops walking and stands at the bridge railing to look at the water
two samurai approach from behind on the bridge

agents.ego_description: walking across the wooden bridge and pausing to gaze at the stormy coastal view with distant mountains

notable_agents.action: samurai in patterned armor walking up behind the character from the left
samurai in traditional armor approaching from the right side of the bridge

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the bridge walkway
wooden fence railing along the right side of the bridge
wide body of choppy water with waves lapping against the shore
mountain silhouettes visible across the water under dark clouds
dark smoke rising from fires on the distant shoreline
traditional stone lantern at the bridge entrance

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wooden bridge revealing an expansive coastal view with choppy waters and mountains in the distance. Dark smoke rises from the far shore. The character stops to observe the view as two samurai approach from behind on the bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic confines of a village street to an expansive, stormy coastal vista. It begins by following the character through a narrow path enclosed by traditional wooden buildings, passing a villager before turning left at a stone retaining wall. As the character moves forward, the scene opens up upon crossing a wooden bridge, shifting from the sheltered village architecture to a wide view of choppy waters and distant mountains. The perspective then expands to reveal dark smoke rising from the far shore, where the character pauses to observe the horizon just as two samurai approach from behind.
